title: Gold Confetti Balloons - 50 PCS 12 inch Pack - Strong Thicken Latex Balloons for Birthday Party, Weddings, Baby Showers & Events

【Perfect Party Decorations】You can hang or stick these confetti balloons on doors, walls, ceilings, doorways and other places you want to decorate, Be it a birthday, wedding anniversary, baby showers, Valentine's Day, corporate event, graduation party. These gold balloons are just perfect for all your party decoration needs.
【NON-TOXIC & SAFE】The gold confetti balloons is made of high-quality environmentally friendly latex material, which is durable, odorless, and safe for children.

【ATTENTION & WARNING】Avoid direct sunlight, and keep away from sharp objects and excessive friction. ​If you have any questions, please feel free to contact us! we will give you a full refund. Your problem can be solved within 24 hours.
